text_original: first to much ad's 🙄🤦‍♀️and second whole app shut down for 18 hours 😒it's irritated and asking money to open like really🤨 fix it
text_zh: 首先广告太多了🙄🤦‍♀️，其次整个应用停运了18个小时😒，真让人烦躁，而且还要收钱才能打开，认真的吗🤨快修复一下
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the frustration. To keep our high-quality AI running, we use ads and subscriptions to cover server costs. Regarding the 18-hour shutdown, please email your UID and details to support@fantachat.ai so we can investigate if it was a server issue or a bug. We want to make this right for you!
reply_zh: 你好，对于给您带来的困扰，我深表歉意。为了维持高质量 AI 的运行，我们通过广告和订阅来支付服务器成本。关于 18 小时停机的问题，请将您的 UID 和详细信息发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们调查是服务器问题还是程序错误。我们希望能为您解决这个问题！
